description: Golden retrieval dataset. Each item ingests a single text document, fixes a deterministic embedding per chunk via monkeypatched embed_texts/embed_query, and asserts that the expected chunk(s) appear in the top-K retrieval.

sections: Paris is the capital city of France and one of the largest cities in Europe.
The Eiffel Tower, located in Paris, was completed in 1889 for the World's Fair.
France is a founding member of the European Union and hosts many international bodies.
